attributes.action: Legislate so that the people can FORCE a general election.
attributes.additional_details: The people are sick and tired of the lies and broken promises of politicians. If you want people to believe what you are telling us, and believe what you say you will do . There is one thing you could do that would convince people you will honor your word. Promise that you will legislate so that the people can FORCE a general election. That would make any party that is in power, totally accountable to the people.
attributes.background: Legislate so that the people can FORCE a general election. That would make any party that is in power, totally accountable to the people

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign the following petitions, which call for similar action:

Pass a law that triggers an early General Election via a public petition
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/739383

Mandate petitionable new elections if govt has under 25% UK electorate support
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/754296
